Ready for review: MigrationDefinition value object, HasMigrationsInterface, FilesystemManifestLoader, MigrationRegistry with DependencyGraph + DFS cycle detection, MigrationCycleException + MigrationDependencyMissingException, integration test for ServiceProvider boot wiring (filesystem + provider sources; cycle propagation). 7953 tests, 0 failures.

review.reference: Approved: FR-011..FR-017 covered; full phpunit 7953/0/0 (2 skipped baseline); cs+phpstan+composer-policy+package-layers green; Kahn (DependencyGraph::topologicalOrder, lexicographic tie-break) + DFS three-color (CycleDetector, back-edge path extraction with closing repeat) is a defensible deviation from the Tarjan SCC hint — FR-015 mandates a cycle PATH which DFS produces natively while Tarjan would need extra work to extract from an SCC; withMigrationProviders() seam is properly @internal-tagged with rationale (parallel to WP01 PluginRegistry, awaits generic kernel capability bus); MigrationDefinition is final readonly with @api, exhaustive constructor validation (id regex, process map all three shapes, no self-reference, no duplicate deps); @api on all 9 public surfaces; FilesystemManifestLoader sorts paths lexicographically (R2 mitigation); MigrationRegistry eagerly booted from ServiceProvider::boot() so structural errors surface at framework startup; HasMigrationsInterface referenced in fixtures and docs/specs; no psr/log, no service locators, no class-string registries; layer compliance migration→foundation only.

Ready for review — id-map + SourceId + idempotency primitives complete; all gates green; full suite Tests: 8004, Assertions: 20495, 0 failures.

review.reference: Approved at 76298e805. All gates green (8004 tests pass, cs-check, phpstan, composer-policy, layers; dead-code clean for WP04 files). FR-025..FR-031 implemented with @spec tags; 51 new tests (13 SourceId / 9 CanonicalForm / 17 MigrationIdMap / 8 SourceReadException / 4 integration incl. transactional rollback, cross-connection visibility, schema up/down/up, run_id tiebreaker). Accepted tradeoffs: (a) src/ layout per owned_files (not data-model.md's IdMap/ subdir) -- mechanical-only follow-up if needed; (b) MigrationIdMap::delete()/deleteAllForMigration() pre-check via lookupDestination() since DatabaseInterface::delete() does not surface affected rows -- acceptable for non-hot-path migration workloads; (c) portable upsert via SELECT+UPDATE-or-INSERT inside caller's transactional() block -- no driver branching, single-statement native upsert deferred. Forwarded: WP07 owns migration_run_state R2 clock-collision tests; WP10 owns MySQL/Postgres conformance for migration_id_map. database-legacy is Layer 0, so migration's L3 require is policy-clean.

WP05 ready for review — EntityDestination + factory + DestinationWriteException + SaveContext::isImport + fixtures + 12 integration tests. cs-check (2 passes), phpstan, layer-check, composer-policy, full phpunit (8101 tests, 20692 assertions) all green.

review.reference: WP05 approved. Hard gates green (phpunit 8101/20692; cs-check; phpstan; check-composer-policy; check-package-layers). FR-018..FR-024 + FR-029/FR-031 satisfied. Atomicity: write() wraps EntityRepository::save() + idMap->upsert() inside MigrationIdMap::transactional(); atomicity_save_failure_rolls_back_id_map_upsert test asserts id-map row absent after stream-resource JSON-encode throw inside the transaction. Skip path (FR-031): hash equality on prior idMap row returns prior WriteResult BEFORE the transaction; verified by skip_path_unchanged_hash_returns_prior_write_result_without_save_or_upsert (event counter unchanged across two writes). Access: GateInterface::denies('create'|'update') with reason codes entity_create_denied / entity_update_denied; ForbidAllPolicy test confirms exception path AND no id-map leak. SaveContext::isImport added as a purely additive readonly property (default false) with 9 unit tests; existing call sites unchanged. Double-event dispatch (destination dispatches BeforeSave/AfterSave around EntityRepository::save()) accepted as the only currently-feasible way to thread isImport through events given EntityRepository::save() does not accept SaveContext; assertions confirm captured event saveContext()->isImport === true. No direct DBAL entity-table writes (rg ->insert\(/->update\( clean). Layers green: composer require contains only L0/L1 (foundation, database-legacy, entity, entity-storage, access). Fixtures kept under tests/Fixtures (autoload-dev only). rollback() raises \LogicException — explicit forward to WP08. M-001 revisionable driver row-count-vs-in-memory-id quirk noted as pre-existing; out of scope. Forwards: WP07 (override resolveRunId); WP08 (implement rollback()); WP10 (conformance use CanonicalForm::encode + sha256 recipe and MigrationTestWidget fixtures); WP11 (supply fieldMap for CSV->entity translation).
